set.body: Investigate first-touch interactive methods for adgeMatrix: print(), str(), summary(), format(), head(), tail(), as.character(), dput(), and related prompt-facing behavior. Use fresh Rscript probes, compare with base matrix and Matrix::dgeMatrix where needed, and file any concrete amatrix-specific bug with a runnable repro plus observed vs expected behavior. Do not close discovered bugs from the hunt.
set.title: Round 6 bug hunt: REPL inspection surface for adgeMatrix
